item.title: 库克现身员工大会：「身体健康」，计划长期担任苹果执行董事长
item.guid: 库克现身员工大会：「身体健康」，计划长期担任苹果执行董事长
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, on April 21, local time, Tim Cook, who is set to step down as CEO in September this year, appeared at an Apple all-hands meeting. At the meeting, Cook responded to external speculation about his health. 据彭博社报道，当地时间 4 月 21 日，即将于今年 9 月卸任 CEO 的 Tim Cook 现身苹果全体员工大会。会上，库克回应了外界对其健康状况的猜测。

I am excited to continue serving at Apple as Executive Chairman... I am healthy and energetic, and I plan to serve in the new role for a long time.

He emphasized that he would support Ternus, who will take over as CEO in September, "in any way needed," providing knowledge and experience at any time, and serving as "someone to exchange ideas with." 他强调，自己将「以任何需要的方式」支持将于 9 月接任 CEO 的 Ternus，随时提供知识与经验，并作为「可以交流想法的对象」。

Cook also stated that "there can only be one CEO at a time," and this new role of Executive Chairman will allow him to focus on strengthening Apple's global relationships. 库克同时表示，「一次只能有一位 CEO」，执行董事长这一全新角色将使他能够专注于强化苹果的全球关系。

When asked why he chose to step down at this time, Cook said he hoped to achieve "the best transition ever" and listed three prerequisites: the company's business must be performing well, the product roadmap must be excellent enough, and Ternus must be ready to take over. 在被问及为何选择此时卸任时，库克表示，他希望实现「史上最佳的过渡」，并列出了三个前提条件：公司业务必须发展良好、产品路线图必须足够出色，以及特努斯必须做好接任准备。

He pointed out that Apple currently has an "impressive" product line and achieved its best quarterly results ever in the recent holiday season. 他指出，苹果当前拥有「令人瞩目」的产品线，且在最近的假日季创下有史以来最好的季度业绩。

These three things were intertwined, and now they are intertwined again, so now is the time.

Ternus, for his part, stated at the meeting that he was particularly excited to take over as CEO at this moment because Apple is "about to change the world again." He promised that AI would create almost infinite potential for Apple products and services, while emphasizing that design would continue to be at the core of everything the company does. Ternus 则在会上表示，他尤其兴奋能在这个时刻接任 CEO，因为 苹果「即将再次改变世界」 。他承诺，AI 将为苹果产品和服务创造几乎无限的潜力，同时强调设计将继续处于公司一切工作的核心位置。

As a company, our essence will not change, and our mission will not change.

Ternus is 51 years old. He graduated from the University of Pennsylvania in 1997, joined Apple in 2001, and has long specialized in hardware engineering, working across core product lines such as AirPods, Mac, iPad, and iPhone, and was promoted to Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering in 2021. Ternus 现年 51 岁，1997 年毕业于宾夕法尼亚大学，2001 年加入苹果，长期深耕硬件工程领域，历经 AirPods、Mac、iPad 及 iPhone 等核心产品线，并于 2021 年晋升为硬件工程高级副总裁.

🔗 Related Reading: Apple's New CEO Holds All-Hands Meeting: To Build AI Hardware, Retain Top Talent, and Change the World 🔗 相关阅读： 苹果新 CEO 召开员工大会：要造 AI 硬件、要留顶级人才，还要改变世界

item.title: 「最前沿 AI 智能体编程模型」GPT-5.5 意外偷跑，OpenAI 紧急下线
item.guid: 「最前沿-AI-智能体编程模型」GPT-5.5-意外偷跑，OpenAI-紧急下线
item.description:
Yesterday, developer "DavidAGMM" posted on Reddit, stating that when opening Codex, a large list of unreleased models unexpectedly appeared in the dropdown menu. According to the leaked screenshots and video, this leak involved the following models: 昨天，开发者「DavidAGMM」在 Reddit 发文表示，打开 Codex 时，下拉菜单中意外出现了大量未经公开发布的模型列表。根据曝光截图与视频，此次泄露共涉及以下几个模型：

    GPT-5.5 and oai-2.1 are both labeled as "cutting-edge AI agent programming models";

    Arcanine is described as "a cutting-edge model with a legendary appetite for starchy foods";

    glacier-alpha is labeled as "wisdom that shakes continents," and glacier-alpha-block-cy3 as "icy wisdom";

    Additionally, there is Heisenberg, described as "the latest cutting-edge life science research model."

However, after selecting GPT-5.5 and submitting a request, Codex would return a 400 error, indicating it was not supported. OpenAI quickly fixed the issue after discovery, and the relevant model entries have been removed from the Codex interface. 不过，选择 GPT-5.5 后提交请求，Codex 会返回 400 错误，提示不支持。OpenAI 在发现问题后已迅速修复，相关模型入口已从 Codex 界面下线。

🔗 Related Reading: Claude Bans Accounts, Throttles, Cuts Benefits; OpenAI Seizes Opportunity to Catch You with Codex 🔗 相关阅读： Claude 封号限流砍权益，OpenAI 趁机用 Codex 稳稳接住你

item.title: 曝腾讯、阿里巴巴洽谈投资 DeepSeek，估值已超 200 亿美元
item.guid: 曝腾讯、阿里巴巴洽谈投资-DeepSeek，估值已超-200-亿美元
item.description:
According to Reuters, Tencent Holdings and Alibaba Group are in talks to invest in AI startup DeepSeek, with the target valuation for this round of financing exceeding $20 billion. 据路透社报道，腾讯控股与阿里巴巴集团正就投资 AI 初创公司 DeepSeek 展开谈判，此轮融资的目标估值已超过 200 亿美元。

The report cited four informed sources as saying that DeepSeek had previously launched its first round of external financing, with an initial target of at least $300 million in funding and a valuation of at least $10 billion. With strong interest from potential investors, the valuation target has been significantly raised. 报道引述四位知情人士称，此前 DeepSeek 已启动首轮外部融资，初步目标为融资至少 3 亿美元、估值至少 100 亿美元，而随着潜在投资方的浓厚兴趣，估值目标已大幅上调。

However, the report emphasized that this round of financing negotiations is still ongoing, and both the final financing amount and valuation are subject to change. 不过，报道强调，此轮融资谈判仍在进行中，最终融资金额与估值均存在变数。

In addition, yesterday, several developers reported in DeepSeek's official communication groups and on social media that the context window of the model called by DeepSeek's official API has been expanded from the previous 128k to 1 million tokens, and the knowledge cutoff date has also been updated from 2024 to May 2025. 此外，昨天有多位开发者在 DeepSeek 官方交流群及社交媒体上反馈，DeepSeek 官方 API 所调用的模型，上下文窗口已从此前的 128k 扩展至 100 万 tokens，知识截止日期也从 2024 年更新至 2025 年 5 月。

However, the model currently still does not support visual input, only text and speech processing, remaining a non-multimodal model. 不过，该模型目前仍不支持视觉输入，仅支持文本和语音处理，依然为非多模态模型。

item.title: 奥特曼首谈住宅遇袭：前一晚刚说「至少没人想杀我」
item.guid: 奥特曼首谈住宅遇袭：前一晚刚说「至少没人想杀我」
item.description:
Recently, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman publicly responded for the first time to the previous series of attacks on his residence during the Core Memory podcast. 日前，OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥特曼 (Sam Altman) 在 Core Memory 播客节目中首次公开回应了此前住宅连续遇袭事件。

Altman revealed that the night before the attack, several colleagues had dinner at his home. During the meal, they discussed recent intense negative media coverage, and someone comforted him by saying that although the pressure was great, it was 'a good thing in some sense.' Altman casually replied at the time: 'At least no one wants to kill me.' 奥特曼透露，袭击发生前一晚，几位同事在他家中聚餐，席间谈到近期媒体的密集负面报道，有人安慰他说压力虽大，「某种意义上也算好事」。奥特曼当时随口回了一句：「至少没人想杀我。」

Ironically, the next day, a Molotov cocktail was thrown at his doorstep. He called the incident 'a point of reference for everything'—meaning that whatever nasty things people say online, as long as it's just talk, it's not a big deal. He did not elaborate on the details of the attack, only saying that 'there will be more such things,' and then immediately turned the conversation back to work. 讽刺的是，第二天，燃烧弹就扔到了他家门口。他称这件事「让一切都有了参照」—— 别人在网上说什么难听的话，只要仅限于说，就不算大事。他没有展开描述袭击细节，只说「还会有更多类似的事」，随即 G 将话题转回工作。

Altman also disclosed for the first time in the program the breakdown of negotiations with Musk. Altman stated that in the early days of OpenAI, he, Brockman, Ilya Sutskever, and Musk, the four core members, all agreed that the company needed to transition into a for-profit entity. 奥特曼还在节目中首度披露了与马斯克谈判破裂的经过，奥特曼称 OpenAI 早期，他本人、Brockman、Ilya Sutskever 与马斯克四位核心成员均认同公司需要转型为营利性实体。

Negotiations once came close to an agreement: Musk demanded a majority stake, and they conceded; Musk demanded to be CEO and 'let everyone know he was in charge,' and they also agreed. 谈判一度接近达成协议：马斯克要求占多数股权，他们让步了；马斯克要求出任 CEO、「让所有人知道他说了算」，他们也答应了。

Ultimately, however, Musk demanded 'absolute control' over OpenAI, and negotiations broke down. Altman stated: 'No one person should control the entire future, no matter who that person is.' The lawsuit between the two parties was originally scheduled to open on April 27, with Musk seeking damages between $79 billion and $134 billion. 但最终，Musk 提出要对 OpenAI 拥有「绝对控制权」，谈判就此破裂。奥特曼表示：「不应该有一个人掌控整个未来，不管那个人是谁。」双方诉讼原定于 4 月 27 日开庭，马斯克索赔金额在 790 亿至 1340 亿美元之间。

item.title: 特斯拉中国车机将接入豆包与 DeepSeek
item.guid: 特斯拉中国车机将接入豆包与-DeepSeek
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, Tesla China's in-car voice service will soon integrate with the Doubao large model and DeepSeek model. 据财联社报道，特斯拉中国车机语音服务即将接入豆包大模型与 DeepSeek 模型。

Sources revealed that both models are integrated through Volcengine. The Doubao large model is responsible for voice command functions, covering navigation settings, media playback control, air conditioning temperature adjustment, and owner's manual queries; the DeepSeek model provides AI interactive services. 知情人士透露，两款模型均通过火山引擎接入，其中豆包大模型负责语音命令功能，涵盖导航设定、媒体播放操控、空调温度调节及车主手册查询；DeepSeek 模型则提供 AI 互动服务。

According to information disclosed by the Shanghai Cyberspace Administration, Tesla (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. completed the generative AI filing for its 'Tesla In-Car Voice Large Model Service' on April 20, with the filing number Shanghai-TeslaCheJiYuYinDaMoXingFuWu-202603020128. 根据上海市网信办披露的信息，特斯拉（上海）有限公司已于 4 月 20 日完成「特斯拉车机语音大模型服务」的生成式 AI 备案，备案号为 Shanghai-TeslaCheJiYuYinDaMoXingFuWu-202603020128。

item.title: 华为 19 级天才少年赵立晨离职创业，押注具身智能操作系统
item.guid: 华为-19-级天才少年赵立晨离职创业，押注具身智能操作系统
item.description:
According to AI Tech Review, Zhao Lichen, a former Huawei 'genius youth' and Level 19 technical expert, resigned in March this year to join Hangzhou Lagrange Embodied Technology Co., Ltd., transitioning to entrepreneurship and focusing on embodied AI operating systems. 据 AI 科技评论报道，前华为天才少年、19 级技术专家赵立晨已于今年 3 月离职，加入杭州拉格朗日具身技术有限公司，转型创业，聚焦具身智能操作系统方向。

Zhao Lichen completed his bachelor's and master's degrees in software engineering at Beihang University, specializing in 3D vision and multimodal fields for a long time. His academic achievements have accumulated over a thousand citations, making him the only Beihang student to date selected for Huawei's 'Genius Youth' program. 赵立晨本科、硕士均就读于北航软件工程，长期深耕 3D 视觉与多模态领域，相关学术成果引用量累计逾千次，是北航迄今唯一入选华为天才少年计划的学生。

After joining Huawei in 2023 as a campus recruitment master's graduate, he led the continuous iteration of the AI Smart Home AI agent's edge-cloud architecture. The related project won the China Telecom Excellent Innovation Award and is planned for mass production in the second half of this year. 2023 年以校招硕士身份加入华为后，他主导 AI 智家宝 AI 智能体端云架构持续迭代，相关项目获得中国电信卓越创新奖，并计划于今年下半年迎来大规模量产。

With his outstanding technical and delivery capabilities, Zhao Lichen was promoted to Level 19 within two years, becoming one of Huawei's youngest technical executives. 凭借突出的技术与交付能力，赵立晨在两年多时间内晋升至 19 级，成为华为最年轻的技术高管之一。

item.title: 仰望 U9 将登陆《GT 赛车 7》，中国超跑首次
item.guid: 仰望-U9-将登陆《GT-赛车-7》，中国超跑首次
item.description:
PlayStation officially announced yesterday that the BYD Yangwang U9 will be officially launched in 'Gran Turismo 7' today at 14:00, becoming the first Chinese supercar to appear in the game. PlayStation 昨天官宣，比亚迪仰望 U9 将于今天 14:00 正式上线《GT 赛车 7》，成为首款登陆该游戏的中国超跑。

The model launched this time is rumored to be the high-performance version Yangwang U9 Xtreme—this is the track/extreme version of the Yangwang U9, equipped with a four-motor system, with a combined horsepower of approximately 3019 hp, a top speed exceeding 496 km/h. It previously set a production electric vehicle lap record of 6:59.157 at the Nürburgring Nordschleife and appeared on the official Nürburgring lap time list. 此次上线的车型据传是高性能版本仰望 U9 Xtreme —— 这是仰望 U9 的赛道 / 极限版，搭载四电机系统，综合马力约 3019 匹，极速超过 496 km/h，曾以 6:59.157 的成绩在纽博格林北环创造量产电动车圈速纪录，并登陆纽北官方圈速榜单。

Previously, the Xiaomi SU7 Ultra had already launched in the game, becoming the first Chinese brand model to enter the GT series. 此前，小米 SU7 Ultra 已率先登陆该游戏，成为首款进入 GT 系列的中国品牌车型。

item.title: 已交付 286 台全部召回，张雪机车 820RR 因机油泄漏隐患停售整改
item.guid: 已交付-286-台全部召回，张雪机车-820RR-因机油泄漏隐患停售整改
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhangxue Motorcycle officially released the "820RR Recall Notice," initiating a comprehensive recall and rectification for its 820RR model. It is reported that the cause of this recall was a crankshaft case rupture accident that occurred in Yinchuan on April 16. 昨天，张雪机车官方发布《820RR 召回通告》，对旗下 820RR 车型展开全面召回整改。据悉，此次召回的起因是 4 月 16 日发生在银川的一起曲轴箱破裂事故。

The damaged vehicle was returned to the factory on April 21. After disassembly and inspection, the factory confirmed that the root cause of the malfunction was an incorrect assembly of the O-ring on the pressure relief valve—after the vehicle had been in use for some time, the pressure relief valve loosened, leading to oil pressure leakage, which in turn caused insufficient lubrication and ultimately resulted in connecting rod bearing failure. 受损车辆于 4 月 21 日返回工厂，经拆解检查，工厂确认故障根源为泄压阀的 O 型密封圈装配错误——车辆使用一段时间后，泄压阀出现松动，导致机油压力泄漏，进而引发润滑不足，最终造成连杆拉瓦。

Currently, 286 units of the 820RR have been delivered. Zhangxue Motorcycle requires all owners to immediately cease using the model and contact authorized dealerships to arrange for towing, with the dealerships responsible for carrying out the rectification. 目前，820RR 已累计交付 286 台。张雪机车要求所有车主即刻停止使用该车型，并联系授权门店安排拖运，由门店负责执行整改。

Based on the actual condition of the vehicle, Zhangxue Motorcycle offers two rectification plans: 根据车辆实际状态，张雪机车提供两套整改方案：

    Owners whose pressure relief valves have already loosened or developed play can choose to return or exchange their vehicle;

    Owners whose pressure relief valves have not yet loosened and have no play, and only need to replace the O-ring, will receive 2 free maintenance services as compensation.

item.title: 特斯拉一季度营收 224 亿美元，六座工厂同步推进，今年将烧掉逾 250 亿美元
item.guid: 特斯拉一季度营收-224-亿美元，六座工厂同步推进，今年将烧掉逾-250-亿美元
item.description:
According to CNBC, Tesla released its Q1 2026 financial report after market close yesterday: 据 CNBC 报道，特斯拉昨日盘后公布 2026 年第一季度财报：

    Revenue of $22.4 billion, slightly below LSEG analysts' average estimate of $22.6 billion;

    Overall gross margin rose to 21.1%, an increase of approximately 4.78 percentage points from the same period last year;

    Automotive gross margin (excluding carbon credits) rebounded to 19.2%, the highest in recent quarters;

    Q1 deliveries were 358,023 vehicles, a year-over-year increase of approximately 6.3%, but below Wall Street expectations, with inventory backlog exceeding 50,000 vehicles;

    Energy storage deployment for the energy business decreased by 38% quarter-over-quarter to 8.8 GWh, also below analyst expectations.

Regarding capital expenditures, CFO Vaibhav Taneja raised this year's full-year capital expenditure forecast from $20 billion to over $25 billion , a significant increase from $8.6 billion in 2025, and explicitly stated that negative free cash flow will occur for the remainder of this year. 资本支出层面，CFO Vaibhav Taneja 将今年 全年资本支出预测从 200 亿美元上调至逾 250 亿美元 ，较 2025 年的 86 亿美元大幅增加，并明确表示今年剩余时间将出现负自由现金流。

Tesla is simultaneously advancing the construction of six factories and making large-scale investments in AI infrastructure, Cybercab, Optimus, Megapack 3, and other projects. 特斯拉正同时推进六座工厂建设，并大规模投入 AI 基础设施、Cybercab、Optimus 及 Megapack 3 等项目。

CEO Elon Musk stated that Cybercab production has begun, Semi is about to enter production, and Optimus humanoid robots are expected to start mass production at the Fremont factory later this year, but all three products are in their early ramp-up phases. CEO 埃隆·马斯克表示，Cybercab 已开始生产，Semi 即将投产，Optimus 人形机器人预计今年晚些时候在弗里蒙特工厂启动量产，但三款产品均处于爬坡初期。

In addition, he revealed that the AI5 chip has completed tape-out and will be prioritized for deployment in Optimus and data centers. The company also announced plans to build a research wafer fab at Giga Texas, with an initial investment of approximately $3 billion, collaborating with Intel to use the 14A process, and the initial phase of the large-scale Terafab project will be led by SpaceX. 此外，他还透露 AI5 芯片已完成流片，将优先部署于 Optimus 及数据中心。公司还宣布将在 Giga Texas 建设研究型晶圆厂，初期投资约 30 亿美元，与英特尔合作采用 14A 制程，大规模 Terafab 项目初期阶段将由 SpaceX 负责推进。

Regarding autonomous driving, paid FSD users have reached approximately 1.3 million, Robotaxi service has expanded from Austin to Dallas and Houston, with plans to enter about a dozen more states within the year, and the unsupervised FSD rollout to consumer fleets is expected to gradually advance in the fourth quarter. 自动驾驶方面，付费 FSD 用户已达约 130 万，Robotaxi 服务已从奥斯汀扩展至达拉斯和休斯顿，计划年内进入约十余个州，无监督 FSD 向消费者车队的开放预计于第四季度逐步推进。

item.title: Claude Pro 订阅权益被砍，官方：是小规模测试
item.guid: Claude-Pro-订阅权益被砍，官方：是小规模测试
item.description:
Yesterday, Anthropic quietly removed Claude Code from the benefits page of its Claude Pro subscription plan without any formal announcement, sparking strong dissatisfaction within the developer community. 昨天，Anthropic 在未发出任何正式公告的情况下，悄然从 Claude Pro 订阅套餐的权益页面中移除了 Claude Code，引发开发者社区强烈不满。

Claude's official website's latest pricing page shows that the Claude Code item in the Pro plan has been marked with a red cross. Claude 官网最新的定价页面显示，Pro 套餐中的 Claude Code 项目已被标注红叉。

After the incident came to light, Amol Avasare, Anthropic's Head of Growth, responded on X, stating that this move was merely a "small-scale test" targeting approximately 2% of new users, aimed at exploring "more sustainable service models," and emphasized that the rights of existing Pro and Max subscribers are completely unaffected . 事件曝光后，Anthropic 增长负责人 Amol Avasare 在 X 上发文回应，称此举仅是一项针对约 2% 新用户的「小规模测试」，旨在探索「更可持续的服务模式」，并强调 现有 Pro 和 Max 订阅用户的权益完全不受影响 。

Currently, Anthropic offers a Claude Pro plan for $20 per month and a Claude Max plan starting from $100 per month. If Claude Code is eventually removed from the Pro plan, developers will have to upgrade to Max 5x or higher tiers, increasing the monthly fee to at least $100. 目前，Anthropic 提供每月 20 美元的 Claude Pro 套餐和每月 100 美元起的 Claude Max 套餐。若 Claude Code 最终从 Pro 套餐中移除，开发者将不得不升级至 Max 5x 或更高档位，月费至少提升至 100 美元。

item.title: 智谱 GLM Coding Plan 无周限额老套餐本月退场，老用户获 2 个月补偿
item.guid: 智谱-GLM-Coding-Plan-无周限额老套餐本月退场，老用户获-2-个月补偿
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhipu Open Platform officially announced that the old GLM Coding Plan (without weekly limits) will stop automatic renewal starting from April 30th at 10:00. The price and benefits within the current subscription period will not be affected. 昨天，智谱开放平台官方发布公告，GLM Coding Plan 老套餐（无周限额）将于 4 月 30 日 10:00 起停止自动续订，当前订阅周期内的价格与权益不受影响。

The official statement indicated that as the usage of GLM Coding Plan continues to expand, the original supply method of the old plan can no longer support long-term stable services. This adjustment is unavoidable, and the affected users are those who are currently subscribed to the old plan (without weekly limits) and have enabled automatic renewal. 官方表示，随着 GLM Coding Plan 使用规模持续扩大，老套餐原有的供给方式已难以支撑长期稳定的服务，此次调整不可避免，受影响用户范围为：当前订阅老套餐（无周限额）且已开启自动续订的用户。

As compensation, Zhipu will automatically issue 2 months of new plan benefits of the same level to affected users on April 30th. If users wish to continue using the GLM Coding Plan afterwards, they can subscribe to the latest plan available online after their current plan expires. 作为补偿，智谱将于 4 月 30 日自动向受影响用户发放 2 个月同等级的新套餐权益。后续如需继续使用 GLM Coding Plan，用户可在套餐到期后自行订阅届时线上提供的最新套餐方案。

item.title: 哪吒汽车造车 3 年亏 183 亿
item.guid: 哪吒汽车造车-3-年亏-183-亿
item.description:
According to CCTV's 'Focus Interview' report, NETA Auto's parent company, Hozon New Energy, accumulated net losses of up to 18.3 billion yuan between 2021 and 2023, losing over 80,000 yuan on average for every car sold. 据央视《焦点访谈》报道，哪吒汽车母公司合众新能源 2021 年至 2023 年三年间累计净亏损高达 183 亿元，平均每卖出一辆车亏损超过 8 万元。

In 2022, NETA Auto's annual sales reached 152,100 units, making it the sales champion among new energy vehicle startups. However, improper product positioning led to a continuous decline in sales thereafter, and production officially ceased in November 2024. In the second half of 2025, Hozon New Energy was petitioned for 'bankruptcy reorganization' by creditors. 2022 年，哪吒汽车年销量达 15.21 万辆，曾是造车新势力的销量冠军，但产品定位失当导致销量此后持续下滑，2024 年 11 月正式停产。2025 年下半年，合众新能源被债权人申请「破产重整」。

Meanwhile, state-owned assets in multiple regions are deeply involved. A state-owned company in Yichun invested a cumulative 1.42 billion yuan, with at least 800 million yuan difficult to recover; Nanning also contributed funds for land acquisition and factory construction. CCTV pointed out that some local preferential conditions for attracting investment violate or indirectly violate relevant policies and regulations. 与此同时，多地国资深陷其中。宜春一家国资公司累计投入 14.2 亿元，至少 8 亿元难以追回；南宁方面也曾出资为其购买土地和建设厂房。央视指出，部分地方招商引资的优惠条件违反或变相违反相关政策法规。

In March this year, founder Fang Yunzhou and former CEO Zhang Yong were both listed as dishonest judgment debtors, and Fang Yunzhou has been restricted from high consumption hundreds of times. Currently, Hozon New Energy has publicly pre-recruited potential investors, and the company's official seal, licenses, and bank U-shields have all been handed over to a temporary administrator. 今年 3 月，创始人方运舟与前 CEO 张勇均已被列为失信被执行人，方运舟更被限制高消费数百次。目前，合众新能源已面向社会预招募意向投资人，公司公章、证照及银行 U 盾均已移交临时管理人。

item.title: 💡 李飞飞团队最新研究揭示多模态 AI 致命缺陷：没给图片，它照样「看」得头头是道
item.guid: 💡-李飞飞团队最新研究揭示多模态-AI-致命缺陷：没给图片，它照样「看」得头头是道
item.description:
Stanford University's Fei-Fei Li team recently published a paper revealing a systemic flaw in current mainstream multimodal AI: even without receiving any images, cutting-edge models like GPT-5, Gemini 3 Pro, and Claude Opus 4.5 still 'confidently' describe image details and provide diagnostic conclusions. 斯坦福大学李飞飞团队近日发表论文，揭示了当前主流多模态 AI 存在一种系统性缺陷——即便没有收到任何图片，GPT-5、Gemini 3 Pro、Claude Opus 4.5 等前沿模型依然会「自信地」描述图像细节并给出诊断结论。

Researchers named this phenomenon 'Mirage Reasoning'. 研究者将这一现象命名为「海市蜃楼式推理」（Mirage Reasoning）。

The team constructed a test set called Phantom-0, removing all images from 200 questions that required image viewing to answer, without informing the models. The results showed that all tested models 'described' an image that did not exist in over 60% of cases . 团队构建了一个名为 Phantom-0 的测试集，将 200 道需要看图才能作答的问题的图片全部拿掉，同时不告知模型。结果显示， 所有被测模型在超过 60% 的情况下会「描述」一张根本不存在的图片 。

If common evaluation prompts were added, this ratio even soared to 90%-100%. Across six major mainstream multimodal benchmarks, models still retained an average of 70%-80% of their original scores in 'no-image mode,' meaning that the actual contribution of the images themselves to the final score might only be 20%-30% . 若加入常见的评测提示语，这一比率甚至飙升至 90%-100%。在六大主流多模态基准测试上，模型在「无图模式」下平均仍能保留原始得分的 70%-80%，意味着**图片本身对最终得分的真实贡献可能只有 20%-30%**。

Even more strikingly, the team trained a pure text small model with only 3 billion parameters using Qwen-2.5, which had never seen any images. On the chest X-ray Q&A benchmark, it not only outperformed all multimodal large models but also surpassed the average level of human radiologists by more than 10 percentage points. 更具冲击力的是，团队用 Qwen-2.5 训练了一个仅有 30 亿参数、从未看过任何图片的纯文本小模型，在胸部 X 光问答基准上不仅击败了所有多模态大模型，还将人类放射科医生的平均水平甩开了 10 个百分点以上。

This flaw is particularly dangerous in medical scenarios: when an image upload fails, the model does not report an error but directly outputs a professionally worded diagnostic report, and the content systematically biases towards severe conditions requiring urgent treatment, such as myocardial infarction and melanoma. 这一缺陷在医疗场景中尤为危险：图片上传失败时，模型不会报错，而是直接输出措辞专业的诊断报告，且内容系统性地偏向心肌梗死、黑色素瘤等需要紧急处置的重症。

To address this vulnerability, the team proposed the B-Clean cleaning framework, which identified 74%~77% of questions in three authoritative benchmarks as 'answerable without looking at the image' and removed them. After cleaning, the scores of various models significantly declined, and two-thirds of the benchmarks saw a reversal in rankings. 针对这一漏洞，团队提出了 B-Clean 清洗框架，将三份权威基准中 74%~77% 的题目判定为「不看图也能答对」并予以剔除，清洗后各模型得分大幅下滑，三分之二的基准出现排名逆转。

📄 Full paper: arxiv.org/abs/2603.21687 📄 论文全文：arxiv.org/abs/2603.21687

item.title: 鸿蒙智行五车齐发，全新问界 M9 预售 49.98 万起
item.guid: 鸿蒙智行五车齐发，全新问界-M9-预售-49.98-万起
item.description:
HarmonyOS Smart Travel held its spring new product launch event last night at the Guangzhou Greater Bay Area Culture and Sports Center, with five new cars making their debut, covering various models including coupes, shooting brakes, SUVs, and MPVs: 鸿蒙智行昨晚在广州·大湾区文化体育中心举办春季新品发布会，五款新车集中亮相，涵盖轿跑、猎装、SUV 和 MPV 多种车型：

    Shangjie Z7 and Z7T: Priced at 219,800 to 299,800 yuan and 229,800 to 309,800 yuan, respectively. Both models come standard with the new generation 896-line dual-optical path image-grade lidar and Huawei Qiankun Smart Driving ADS 4.1. SAIC Group President Jia Jianxu revealed at the launch event that pre-orders for the two new cars have exceeded 80,000 units;

    Wenjie M6: Positioned as a mid-to-large SUV, the pure electric version starts from 279,800 yuan, and the extended-range version starts from 259,800 yuan. A Huachuang Securities research report shows that orders for the Wenjie M6 exceeded 60,000 units within 24 hours of opening for pre-orders, with estimated stable monthly sales reaching 15,000 units;

    Zhijie V9: The first MPV under HarmonyOS Smart Travel, and also the first new model launched by the Zhijie brand after entering the 2.0 era, equipped with Huawei Turing MPV customized platform, pre-orders opened last night;

    All-new AITO M9, M9 Ultimate Extended Edition: Standard version pre-sale price starts from 499,800 yuan, Ultimate Extended Edition pre-sale price starts from 669,800 yuan; equipped with "Huan Yu" triple screen (dual 17.2-inch + dual 3.4K resolution), HUAWEI SOUND Ultimate audio system (43 speakers, 2920W amplifier); equipped with an evolved HarmonyOS cockpit.

Richard Yu, Huawei's Executive Director and CEO of Consumer BG, announced at the press conference that the cumulative delivery of all HarmonyOS Smart Mobility series has exceeded 1.35 million units, with 112,700 units delivered in the first quarter of this year, a year-on-year increase of 41.9%. He also revealed that HarmonyOS Smart Mobility currently has 1,835 sales stores and is expected to expand to over 2,459 by the end of the year. 华为常务董事、终端 BG 董事长余承东在发布会上公布，鸿蒙智行全系累计交付已突破 135 万辆，今年第一季度交付 11.27 万辆，同比增长 41.9%。他同时透露，鸿蒙智行现有销售门店 1835 家，预计年底将扩至超过 2459 家。

It is worth mentioning that a small interlude occurred at the press conference: when switching from the completion of the Luxeed Z7/Z7T launch to the AITO M6 segment, a Luxeed vehicle remained on stage and could not move, sparking speculation among netizens. HarmonyOS Smart Mobility later responded that this move was to allow the audience to experience multiple products simultaneously, not a vehicle malfunction, and urged everyone "not to over-interpret or spread rumors" . 值得一提的是，发布会现场出现一段小插曲：在尚界 Z7/Z7T 发布完毕切换至问界 M6 环节时，一台尚界车辆停留在舞台上未能移动，引发现场网友猜测。 鸿蒙智行随后回应称，此举是为让观众同时感受多款产品，并非车辆故障，请大家「不要过度解读、传播」 。

item.title: 小米 MiMo-V2.5 系列开启公测：旗舰版对标 Claude Opus 4.6
item.guid: 小米-MiMo-V2.5-系列开启公测：旗舰版对标-Claude-Opus-4.6
item.description:
Xiaomi officially announced yesterday that the Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 series large models have begun public beta testing, covering four products: MiMo-V2.5, MiMo-V2.5-Pro, MiMo-V2.5-TTS Series, and MiMo-V2.5-ASR, and also announced that two main models will soon be open-sourced globally. 小米昨天正式宣布 Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 系列大模型开启公测，涵盖 MiMo-V2.5、MiMo-V2.5-Pro、MiMo-V2.5-TTS Series 及 MiMo-V2.5-ASR 四款产品，并宣布两款主力模型即将全球开源。

MiMo-V2.5-Pro (Flagship, Long-range AI Agent): MiMo-V2.5-Pro （旗舰，长程 AI 智能体）：

    Benchmarks against Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, capable of stably completing long-range tasks with nearly a thousand tool calls in a single session;

    Completed Peking University's "Compilers" course SysY compiler project in 4.3 hours, achieving a perfect score of 233/233 on the hidden test set;

    Independently built a video editor Web application with multi-track timeline, audio mixing, and other functions in 11.5 hours (8192 lines of code);

    Saves 42% tokens compared to Kimi K2.6 under the same ClawEval benchmark.

MiMo-V2.5 (General-purpose, Native Full-modal AI Agent): MiMo-V2.5 （通用，原生全模态 AI 智能体）：

    Natively supports image, audio, and video multi-modal input, with Agent capabilities fully surpassing the previous generation MiMo-V2-Pro;

    API cost reduced by approximately 50% compared to the previous generation, approaching top-tier closed-source models in evaluations such as VideoMME, CharXiv, MMMU-Pro;

    Saves 50% tokens compared to Muse Spark under the same ClawEval benchmark.

item.title: OpenAI 发布企业级 AI 智能体
item.guid: OpenAI-发布企业级-AI-智能体
item.description:
Early this morning, OpenAI released ChatGPT workspace AI agents, targeting enterprise teams. Powered by Codex and running in the cloud, these agents can handle complex tasks and long-duration workflows, and continue to operate even when users are offline. 今天凌晨，OpenAI 发布了 ChatGPT 工作区 AI 智能体 (workspace agents)，面向企业团队，由 Codex 驱动、运行于云端，可处理复杂任务与长周期工作流，并在用户离线时持续运行。

Workspace AI agents are positioned as an evolved version of GPTs. Teams can simply describe their workflow in ChatGPT to build usable AI agents with system guidance. 工作区 AI 智能体被定位为 GPTs 的进化版本。团队只需在 ChatGPT 中描述工作流程，即可在系统引导下构建可用的 AI 智能体。

AI agents support cross-system context retrieval and can perform operations such as updating work orders, creating documents, and sending messages after authorization. They are currently integrated with ChatGPT and Slack. AI 智能体支持跨系统调取上下文，可在获授权后执行更新工单、创建文档、发送消息等操作，目前已接入 ChatGPT 和 Slack。

Currently, workspace AI agents are available as a research preview to ChatGPT Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plan users. They are free until May 6th, after which they will switch to a credit-based billing model. 目前，工作区 AI 智能体以研究预览版形式向 ChatGPT Business、Enterprise、Edu 和 Teachers 计划用户开放，5 月 6 日前免费，此后切换为基于额度的计费模式。

item.title: 火山方舟 Coding Plan 上线 GLM-5.1，长程任务可持续工作 8 小时
item.guid: 火山方舟-Coding-Plan-上线-GLM-5.1，长程任务可持续工作-8-小时
item.description:
Volcano Engine announced yesterday that Volcano Ark Coding Plan has officially launched GLM-5.1, aligning with the original factory's full capabilities. GLM-5.1's capabilities rival Claude Opus 4.6 in multiple software development benchmarks, and it can continuously perform 8-hour long-range Agent tasks in a single execution. 火山引擎昨日宣布，火山方舟 Coding Plan 正式上线 GLM-5.1，对齐原厂满血能力。GLM-5.1 在多个软件开发基准测试中能力媲美 Claude Opus 4.6，在 Agent 长程任务上可一次性持续执行 8 小时级的连续工作。

Meanwhile, ArkClaw has launched the Hermes Agent plugin. Users can obtain a self-evolving AI agent by clicking "Enable Now" on the welcome page, without needing to manually configure the environment. 与此同时，ArkClaw 推出 Hermes Agent 插件，用户在欢迎页点击「立即开启」即可获得具备自我进化能力的 AI 智能体，无需手动配置环境。

Architecturally, ArkClaw acts as the "control console" responsible for planning processes, while Hermes acts as the "executor," launching terminals, controlling browsers, and running scripts in isolated containers. The execution results are simultaneously deposited into ArkClaw's Memory and Skills. 架构上，ArkClaw 作为「中控台」负责规划流程，Hermes 作为「执行器」在独立容器中拉起终端、控制浏览器、运行脚本，执行结果同步沉淀为 ArkClaw 的 Memory 和 Skills。

item.title: 21.59 万元起，阿维塔 06T 上市
item.guid: 21.59-万元起，阿维塔-06T-上市
item.description:
Yesterday, Avatr officially released its new car 06T, with official prices ranging from 219,900 yuan to 279,900 yuan. It launched five models with two power options, pure electric and extended-range, and is available for delivery immediately upon launch. 昨日，阿维塔正式发布新车 06T，官方售价 21.99 万元至 27.99 万元，共推出纯电与增程两种动力五款车型，上市即交付。

  • All models come standard with Huawei Qiankun ADS assisted driving, equipped with an 896-line image-grade LiDAR, and will be among the first models to feature Huawei Qiankun ADS 5; the Elite version is equipped with a Limera in-cabin laser vision sensor, supporting subscription to urban NCA functions; 全系标配华为乾崑 ADS 辅助驾驶，搭载 896 线图像级激光雷达，将成为首批搭载华为乾崑 ADS 5 的车型；Elite 版配备 Limera 舱内激光视觉传感器，支持订阅城区 NCA 功能；
  • Equipped with HarmonySpace 5 cockpit, introducing MoLA hybrid large model AI agent architecture, and featuring a 35.4-inch 4K panoramic star-ring screen; 搭载鸿蒙座舱 HarmonySpace 5，引入 MoLA 混合大模型 AI 智能体架构，配备 35.4 英寸 4K 全景星环屏；
  • All models come standard with Taihang distributed electric drive, with the fastest 0-100 km/h acceleration in 2.78 seconds, supporting active independent adjustment of left and right torque, and featuring chassis lift for improved passability; 全系标配太行分布式电驱，最快零百加速 2.78 秒，支持主动独立调节左右扭矩，具备底盘抬升通行功能；
  • Both pure electric and extended-range dual power options support 5C supercharging, with a wheelbase of 2940mm; 纯电与增程双动力均支持 5C 超充，轴距 2940mm；
  • Equipped with Huawei Qiankun CAS 4.0 full-dimensional anti-collision system, all models come standard with CATL batteries, with a cell defect rate as low as one in a billion. 搭载华为乾崑 CAS 4.0 全维防碰撞系统，全系标配宁德时代电池，电芯缺陷率低至十亿分之一。

item.title: 荣威 x 火山引擎联合打造 AI 原生汽车架构「CPP」
item.guid: 荣威-x-火山引擎联合打造-AI-原生汽车架构「CPP」
item.description:
Recently, at its 20th-anniversary product launch event, Roewe officially unveiled "Jiayue," the world's first AI-native car series developed in deep cooperation with Volcengine, with three concept cars making their debut simultaneously. 近日，荣威在 20 周年产品发布会上正式发布与火山引擎深度合作的全球首个 AI 原生汽车序列「家越」，三款概念车同步亮相。

Unlike the traditional "car + AI" model, "Jiayue" embeds AI into the vehicle architecture from the very beginning of its design. Based on Roewe's SOA atomic scheduling capabilities, the Doubao large model is deeply integrated into the entire vehicle, forming a complete closed loop from understanding needs to execution. 与传统「汽车 + AI」模式不同，「家越」从设计之初便将 AI 内嵌于整车架构。基于荣威 SOA 原子化调度能力，豆包大模型深度接入整车，形成从理解需求到执行的完整闭环。

Roewe also released the industry's first "CPP" AI-native technical architecture, covering three levels: Context (information acquisition and memory management), Planner (intelligent planning and decision-making), and Pixel (atomic-level precise execution). 荣威同步发布行业首创的「CPP」AI 原生技术架构，覆盖信息获取与记忆管理 (Context)、智能规划决策 (Planner)、原子级精准执行 (Pixel) 三个层级。

The three concept cars are Jiayue 07, Jiayue 06, and Jiayue 09, with the first production model, Jiayue 07, set to debut in June this year. 三款概念车分别为家越 07、家越 06 与家越 09，首款量产车家越 07 将于今年 6 月亮相。

item.title: 曝法拉利 1000 马力纯电超跑下月亮相，定价约 440 万元
item.guid: 曝法拉利-1000-马力纯电超跑下月亮相，定价约-440-万元
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, the preliminary pricing for Ferrari's first pure electric model, Luce, has been set at 550,000 euros (approximately 4.4 million RMB). It will officially debut next month in Rome, Italy, with the final pricing still having about 10% room for fluctuation. 据财联社报道，法拉利首款纯电车型 Luce 定价已初步敲定为 55 万欧元（约合人民币 440 万元），将于下月在意大利罗马正式首发，最终定价仍有约 10% 的浮动空间。

In terms of performance, the car adopts a four-motor layout with a combined power exceeding 1000 horsepower, accelerating from 0 to 100 km/h in 2.5 seconds. Its 122 kWh battery pack offers a range of 530 kilometers, and the 800V architecture supports 15-minute fast charging to 80%. The battery cells are supplied by SK On, with an energy density of 195 Wh/kg. 性能方面，该车采用四电机布局，综合功率超 1000 马力，零百加速 2.5 秒，122 kWh 电池组续航 530 公里，800V 架构支持 15 分钟快充至 80%，电芯由 SK On 供应，能量密度达 195 Wh/kg。

To compensate for the inherent lack of engine sound experience in pure electric models, Ferrari has applied for two patents: an acoustic amplification device and a "virtual gearbox," to replicate the auditory and gear-shifting feedback of an internal combustion engine. 为弥补纯电车型在声浪体验上的天然缺失，法拉利申请了声学放大装置及「虚拟变速箱」两项专利，以还原内燃机的听觉与换挡反馈。

The interior design was led by former Apple Chief Design Officer Jony Ive, who explicitly opposed the idea of large touchscreens, emphasizing that "everything is built on functionality." 内饰由前苹果首席设计官 Jony Ive 操刀，他明确反对大尺寸触控屏的设计思路，强调「所有一切都建立在功能性之上」。

item.title: 阿里发布 AI 数字人「千问小酒窝」
item.guid: 阿里发布-AI-数字人「千问小酒窝」
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba officially released "Qianwen Xiaojiuwo," an ecosystem-level AI assistant digital human. Within the Qianwen APP, users can interact with it to complete daily operations such as ordering meals, buying tickets, hailing taxis, and planning itineraries, covering multiple high-frequency life scenarios. 昨天，阿里巴巴正式发布生态级 AI 助手数字人形象「千问小酒窝」。在千问 APP 内，用户可通过与其对话完成订餐、买票、打车、行程规划等日常操作，覆盖多个高频生活场景。

Alibaba stated that in the future, "Qianwen Xiaojiuwo" will gradually appear in various Alibaba ecosystem applications such as Taobao and Fliggy, becoming an AI life assistant that spans both work and daily life scenarios. 阿里方面表示，未来「千问小酒窝」还将陆续出现在淘宝、飞猪等阿里生态各应用中，逐步成为贯穿工作与生活场景的 AI 生活助手。

item.title: 飞书多维表格上线 AI Agent，一句话完成数据分析
item.guid: 飞书多维表格上线-AI-Agent，一句话完成数据分析
item.description:
Yesterday, Feishu Multi-dimensional Tables underwent a comprehensive upgrade of its AI capabilities, introducing AI Agent features that cover multiple core scenarios such as data analysis, visualization, and form generation. 昨天，飞书多维表格对 AI 能力进行全面升级，推出 AI Agent 功能，覆盖数据分析、可视化呈现与表单生成等多个核心场景。

  • AI Query: Users can directly ask questions to the table using natural language, such as "What is the sales volume for Q1 in East China?" or "Help me predict next month's performance." The system instantly returns analysis results, eliminating the need for manual data filtering or formula writing; AI 问数：用户可直接以自然语言向表格提问，例如「Q1 华东区销售额多少」或「帮我预测下个月业绩」，系统即时返回分析结果，无需手动筛选数据或编写公式；
  • Custom Page Generation: AI Agent supports converting table data into custom pages with a single sentence, automatically generating charts and arranging information, making data presentation more intuitive and clear; 自定义页面生成：AI Agent 支持一句话将表格数据转化为自定义页面，自动完成图表生成与信息布局，使数据呈现更为直观清晰；
  • AI Questionnaire Generation: Users only need to describe their requirements, and the system can automatically generate forms and corresponding data tables, suitable for scenarios such as event registration, user surveys, and feedback collection. AI 生成问卷：用户只需描述需求，系统即可自动生成表单及对应的数据底表，适用于活动报名、用户调研、意见收集等场景。

item.title: 蚂蚁百灵 Ling-2.6-flash 正式发布，主打 Token 效率
item.guid: 蚂蚁百灵-Ling-2.6-flash-正式发布，主打-Token-效率
item.description:
Yesterday, Ant Group's Bailin officially released Ling-2.6-flash, with a total of 104B parameters and 7.4B active parameters, focusing on "Token Efficiency" and positioned for efficient deployment scenarios. 昨天，蚂蚁百灵正式发布 Ling-2.6-flash，总参数量 104B、激活参数 7.4B，主打「Token 效率（Token Efficiency）」，定位高效落地场景。

It's worth mentioning that a week ago, the anonymous test version of this model, "Elephant Alpha," was already launched on OpenRouter, ranking at the top of the Trending list for several consecutive days, with an average daily token call volume reaching 100B and a weekly growth exceeding 5000%. 值得一提的是，早在一周前，该模型的匿名测试版本「Elephant Alpha」便已上线 OpenRouter，连续多日位列 Trending 榜首，日均 tokens 调用量达 100B 级别，周增长超 5000%。

    Token Efficiency: In the full evaluation by Artificial Analysis, the total consumption was only 15M tokens, about 1/10 of Nemotron-3-Super, while achieving an Intelligence Index of 26 points;

    Inference Speed: Up to 340 tokens/s with 4 H20 cards, ranking in the first tier for its parameter level with 215 tokens/s in Output Speed evaluation;

    AI Agent Capability: Achieved SOTA level for its size on mainstream AI agent benchmarks such as BFCL-V4 and SWE-bench Verified;

    Pricing: API input is $0.1 per million tokens, output is $0.3, with a one-week limited-time free trial currently available.

item.title: Odyssey 发布最强世界模型 2 Max
item.guid: Odyssey-发布最强世界模型-2-Max
item.description:
Odyssey yesterday released its latest general world model, Odyssey-2 Max, with 3 times the parameters of its predecessor Odyssey-2 Pro and a 10-fold increase in training computation. Odyssey 昨日发布了旗下最新通用世界模型 Odyssey-2 Max，参数量为前代 Odyssey-2 Pro 的 3 倍，训练计算量提升 10 倍。

Unlike video generation models such as Sora and Veo, Odyssey-2 Max can generate frames based on real-time user operations, rather than pre-generating fixed videos. Users can interact with the simulated world in real-time like playing a game, and the visuals can be continuously generated for over 120 seconds without crashing. In terms of physical simulation accuracy, Odyssey-2 Max performs better than its counterparts: 与 Sora、Veo 等视频生成模型不同，Odyssey-2 Max 能够根据用户的实时操作逐帧生成画面，而非提前生成固定视频，用户可以像玩游戏一样与模拟世界实时互动，且画面可持续生成超过 120 秒而不崩溃。在物理仿真准确度上，Odyssey-2 Max 表现领先同类：

    VBench 2 physical score of 58.52, higher than Odyssey-2 Pro (49.67) and NVIDIA Cosmos-Predict2.5-14B (44.92)

    PAI-Bench physical score of 93.02, also superior to major competitors

Odyssey was co-founded by Oliver Cameron (CEO) and Jeff Hawke (CTO), both from the autonomous driving industry, and had previously raised a total of $27 million in funding. Odyssey 由自动驾驶行业出身的 Oliver Cameron（CEO）与 Jeff Hawke（CTO）联合创办，此前累计融资 2700 万美元。

item.title: 支付宝 AI 付接入「龙虾」平台
item.guid: 支付宝-AI-付接入「龙虾」平台
item.description:
Alipay announced yesterday that its AI Pay feature now supports "Lobster" type AI agents. Users can directly complete payments, purchase tokens, shop, and other payment capabilities when using "Lobster" type AI agents. 支付宝昨日宣布，旗下 AI 付功能新增对「龙虾」类 AI 智能体的支持，用户在使用「龙虾」类 AI 智能体时可直接完成缴费、购买 Token、购物等支付能力。

Currently, Alibaba Cloud's Lobster platform JVS Claw has been pre-installed with Alipay AI Pay and launched first, and Ant Digital Technologies' DTClaw has also been launched simultaneously; other "Lobster" type AI agents such as Claude Code and Hermes Agent also support one-click installation and use of Alipay AI Pay. 目前，阿里云龙虾平台 JVS Claw 已率先预装支付宝 AI 付并首发上线，蚂蚁数科 DTClaw 也已同步上线；Claude Code、Hermes Agent 等其他「龙虾」类 AI 智能体也支持一键安装使用支付宝 AI 付。

After users complete the installation according to the guide on the official website, they only need to tell "Lobster" to "enable Alipay payment function" and complete the authorization as instructed to activate it. 用户在官网根据引导完成安装后，只需对「龙虾」说出「开启支付宝支付功能」，按指引完成授权即可启用。

Regarding security mechanisms, Alipay AI Pay requires users to manually operate and complete identity verification when activating the service. Each payment needs personal authorization and confirmation, and it is equipped with a 24/7 intelligent risk control system. Alipay also promises, "If you dare to pay, I dare to compensate." 在安全机制方面，支付宝 AI 付要求开通服务时用户须手动操作并完成身份核验，每笔支付均需本人授权确认，并配备 7*24 小时智能风控系统。支付宝还就此承诺「你敢付我敢赔」。

item.title: 英国通过新法案：2009 年后出生者终身禁购香烟
item.guid: 英国通过新法案：2009-年后出生者终身禁购香烟
item.description:
According to The Paper, both houses of the UK Parliament yesterday reviewed and passed the Tobacco and Vapes Bill, which stipulates that it is illegal for businesses to sell tobacco products to individuals born on or after January 1, 2009. This means that teenagers currently aged 17 and under will be permanently banned from purchasing cigarettes. 据澎湃新闻报道，英国议会两院已于昨日审议通过《烟草与电子烟法案》，规定商家向 2009 年 1 月 1 日及以后出生的人群售卖烟草制品属违法行为，这意味着目前年龄在 17 岁及以下的青少年将被终身禁止购买香烟。

UK Health Secretary Wes Streeting called this legislation a "historic moment for national health," stating that the bill aims to create the "first smoke-free generation," protecting them from lifelong addiction and the harms of tobacco. 英国卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷将此次立法称为「国民健康的历史性时刻」，表示该法案旨在打造「第一代无烟者」，使其免受终身成瘾与烟草危害。

According to data from the UK's National Health Service, approximately 75,000 people die each year in England from smoking-related diseases, accounting for about a quarter of all deaths. 根据英国国民保健制度的数据，英格兰每年约有 7.5 万人死于吸烟相关疾病，约占全部死亡人数的四分之一。

Once the bill comes into effect, the UK government will be authorized to extend indoor smoking bans to public areas such as children's playgrounds, schools, and outside hospitals, while also restricting the flavors and packaging of e-cigarettes, and simultaneously prohibiting vaping in places where smoking bans are already in force. 法案生效后，英国政府将获得授权，可将室内禁烟令扩展至儿童游乐场、学校及医院外等公共区域，同时限制电子烟的口味与包装，并在已实施禁烟令的场所同步禁止吸电子烟。

item.title: 西贝「换壳」自救：两个月开 11 家焖面馆，部分中差评超 20%
item.guid: 西贝「换壳」自救：两个月开-11-家焖面馆，部分中差评超-20%
item.description:
According to Sina Finance, Xibei founder Jia Guolong is accelerating the transformation of his stores into a new brand, "Tianbian Claypot Braised Noodles." 据新浪财经报道，西贝创始人贾国龙正将旗下门店加速转型为新品牌「天边砂锅焖面」。

Yesterday, Xibei's first Shanghai store was rebranded and renovated. On the same day, two other Shanghai stores also opened, expanding the brand's national store count to 11 within two months, mostly through renovations of existing Xibei locations, with an average per-person spend of about 50 yuan. 昨日，西贝上海首店摘牌换新，同日另有两家上海门店同步开业，使该品牌在两个月内全国门店数量扩至 11 家，多为西贝原址改造，人均消费约 50 元。

In terms of reputation, the first store to open in Beijing's 798 Art Zone received only a 3.9 rating on Dazhong Dianping, with over 20% of consumers giving average or lower reviews, and most stores scoring below 4 points. User complaints focused on "not having the authentic braised noodle taste," "slow service," and even joked, "the pot is bigger than the face, and the noodles are smaller than the hand." 口碑方面，最早开业的北京 798 园区首店大众点评评分仅 3.9 分，超 20% 消费者给出中等及以下评价，多数门店评分在 4 分以下。用户吐槽集中于「没有做出焖面的味道」「上菜慢」，甚至调侃「锅比脸大，面比手小」。

Earlier this year, Jia Guolong disclosed an estimated loss of over 600 million yuan and announced the closure of 102 stores nationwide, accounting for about 30% of the total. "Tianbian Claypot Braised Noodles" is precisely the brand that takes on the "transform" part of the strategy: "close some, transform some, and retain a core few." 今年年初，贾国龙披露，预计亏损超 6 亿元，并宣布关闭全国 102 家门店，约占总数的 30%。「天边砂锅焖面」正是「关一批、转一批、保留核心一批」策略中「转」的承接品牌。

item.title: 五一档《寒战 1994》发布终极预告
item.guid: 五一档《寒战-1994》发布终极预告
item.description:
The movie "Cold War 1994" released its "Open Strife, Secret Struggle" ultimate trailer yesterday and simultaneously began nationwide pre-sales. 电影《寒战 1994》于昨日发布「明争暗斗」版终极预告，并同步开启全国预售。

The film's story is set against the critical historical backdrop of Hong Kong's handover of sovereignty and the Chief Executive's transition in 1994. The plot revolves around the kidnapping of a wealthy businessman, with young Cai Yuanqi and Li Wenbin taking sides and testing each other amidst the turbulent situation, gradually moving from allies to adversaries. The film will be released nationwide on May 1st. 影片故事背景设定于 1994 年香港主权移交与特首换届的关键历史节点。剧情围绕一宗富商绑架案展开，青年蔡元祺与李文彬在局势动荡中各自站队、彼此试探，从同局之人逐步走向对立。影片将于 5 月 1 日全国上映

item.title: 《绝密任务》定档 6 月 19 日
item.guid: 《绝密任务》定档-6-月-19-日
item.description:
According to Weibo Movies, the film "Top Secret Mission" is officially set for release today, June 19th, and has unveiled its "Call to Action" trailer. 据微博电影报道，电影《绝密任务》今日正式定档 6 月 19 日，并发布「请战出击」版预告片。

The film focuses on a female anti-terrorism special forces team, recounting their top-secret mission to perform extreme hostage rescues and eliminate terrorist threats, carrying out high-difficulty operations in dangerous environments. 影片聚焦一支女子反恐特战队，讲述其执行极限营救人质、消除恐怖威胁的绝密任务，在凶险环境中展开高难度行动。

item.title: 《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》影评开分：烂番茄 34%，影评人褒贬不一
item.guid: 《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》影评开分：烂番茄-34%，影评人褒贬不一
item.description:
According to blogger "Watchmen Hollywood," reviews for the Michael Jackson biopic "Michael Jackson: The Road to Stardom" have been unembargoed, with initial reactions showing a clear division. The film will officially be released this Friday. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，迈克尔·杰克逊传记片《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》影评解禁，首批口碑呈现明显分化。影片将于本周五正式上映。

As of yesterday afternoon, the film's Rotten Tomatoes score was 34% (out of 96 reviews, 33 positive, 63 negative), and its Metacritic aggregate score was 38 (out of 35 reviews, 6 positive, 17 mixed, 12 negative), indicating an overall low critical reception. 截至昨日下午，影片在烂番茄平台新鲜度为 34%（共 96 条评论，33 条好评，63 条差评），Metacritic 综合评分为 38 分（35 条评论，6 好 17 中 12 差），整体口碑偏低。

Variety magazine's review was relatively positive, stating that while the film didn't delve into Michael Jackson's darker side, it was "excellently performed, engaging, and a biopic acceptable to most," comparing it to "an 80s TV movie with more vivid performances and prettier cinematography." 《Variety》杂志的评价相对正面，认为影片虽未触及迈克尔·杰克逊的黑暗面，但「演绎出色、引人入胜，是一部多数人可接受的传记片」，并将其比作「有更鲜明表演和更漂亮摄影的 80 年代电视电影」。

Screen Rant, on the other hand, gave a more positive affirmation, believing that the film "from casting to costumes to concert stage performances, lives up to the legendary status of the name Michael." Screen Rant 则给出了较为积极的肯定，认为影片「从选角到服装到演唱会舞台表演，不负迈克尔这个名字的传奇地位」。
